front: What are the mechanisms of immune-related adverse events (irAEs) from checkpoint inhibitors?
back: irAEs: autoimmune-like toxicity from enhanced immune activation. Mechanisms: loss of peripheral tolerance, pre-existing autoantibodies, molecular mimicry. Common: colitis, hepatitis, dermatitis, endocrinopathies. Management: corticosteroids, infliximab, vedolizumab.
